name: Absolute Activity Center
description: Absolute Activity Center is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in LaFollette, TN. There are 2 indoor acrylic courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. You can reserve the courts. A one-time fee is required to play. Players have access to restrooms and trainers or lessons.

name: Cove Lake State Park
description: Cove Lake State Park is a place to play pickleball in Caryville, TN. There are 3 outdoor courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. The courts are free.

name: LaFollette Recreation Park
description: LaFollette Recreation Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in LaFollette, TN. There are 2 outdoor courts.
